hero.subtitle: Award-winning custom homes across Vancouver, Burnaby, and the North Shore. Over 20 years of design-build expertise, delivered on time and on budget.

projects_lead: Every project reflects our commitment to quality, transparency, and craftsmanship.

paragraphs: Ultralux Homes Inc designs and builds boutique single-family homes with over 20 years of experience. There is nothing quite like living in a home which you have helped design, and tailored to your family's every need.

We are a design/build firm, providing services from architectural plans through permitting to construction. Our multidisciplinary team includes experts in design, onsite construction, and project management.
Building a new home can be one of the most stressful ventures you undertake. We exist to take that stress away, guiding you through every step with transparency and communication.

items.title: Custom Homes
items.description: A custom home is a one of a kind design created to meet the specific needs of you and your family. We specialize in boutique single-family homes in Vancouver and Burnaby.

items.title: Duplex Homes
items.description: Convert a single property into two legal properties. Occupy one unit while selling or renting the other — a smart way to maximize property value.

items.title: Laneway Homes
items.description: Secondary detached structures built on existing lots. Smarter living in smaller spaces — a sustainable housing option gaining popularity across Vancouver.

items.title: Major Renovations
items.description: From structural upgrades to complete interior transformations. Our team manages every detail of your renovation with the same standards as our new builds.

steps.title: Consult
steps.description: We connect with you to understand your needs, budget, and quality expectations. Site assessments, code review, and high-level budget planning.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: Architects and designers collaborate with you to visualize the project. Permits filed, engineers engaged, and detailed budget estimates developed.

steps.title: Interior
steps.description: Select how your interior space reflects your vision. Fixtures, finishings, and full budget transparency on how design decisions impact costs.

steps.title: Build
steps.description: Construction begins with a set schedule. Our team and trusted subcontractors execute while you receive transparent timeline and budget tracking.

testimonial.quote: Come visit our construction sites. Building a custom home is a big decision, and we believe seeing our work firsthand is the best way to experience the quality and care we put into every project.
testimonial.author: UltraLux Custom Homes

contact.subtitle: Contact us for a free consultation. We serve Vancouver, Burnaby, North Vancouver, and West Vancouver.

footer.description: UltraLux Custom Homes is an award-winning design-build firm specializing in custom homes, duplexes, and laneway homes across Vancouver, Burnaby, and the North Shore. Over 20 years of building excellence.
footer.cta_subtitle: Whether you're planning a custom home, duplex, or renovation, we'd love to hear your vision.
